moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Live
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is currently live across the UK, running until July 5th, with matches in Birmingham, Bristol, Leeds, London, Manchester, and Southampton.

angles.name: Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: Who's making waves at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup? The action is live across the UK and the competition is fierce!

angles.name: Home Crowd Advantage
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup final is set for London on July 5th! Are you ready to cheer on the teams?

moments.title: UK Athletics Championships Just Wrapped
moments.blurb: The 2026 UK Athletics Championships concluded on June 21st in Birmingham, with top British athletes competing for national titles and European Championship qualification.

angles.name: Athletics Highlights
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the UK Athletics Championships in Birmingham this weekend! Who were your standout performers?

angles.name: Birmingham Action
angles.copy: Birmingham hosted the best of British athletics this past weekend. What a show put on by our track and field stars!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's oldest tennis tournament, begins its 14-day run on Monday, June 29th, 2026.

angles.name: Tennis Season
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 starts next Monday. Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The All England Club gates open on Monday for Wimbledon! Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis right here in London.

moments.title: British Grand Prix Incoming
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is set to roar into action from July 2nd to July 5th, 2026.

angles.name: F1 Countdown
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is just around the corner. Who's heading trackside?

angles.name: Silverstone Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for high-octane drama! Silverstone hosts the British Grand Prix from July 2nd. Expect speed, thrills, and hopefully a home win!

moments.title: Official Singles Chart This Week
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 40 for June 18th - June 24th is out, featuring new entries from Olivia Rodrigo, LE SSERAFIM x ILLIT x KATSEYE, and Shakira & Burna Boy.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The Official Singles Chart is fresh! Who's at number one and what new tracks are making a splash this week?

angles.name: New Entries
angles.copy: New music alert! Olivia Rodrigo, LE SSERAFIM x ILLIT x KATSEYE, and Shakira & Burna Boy are all in the new Top 40. What's your favourite?

moments.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 Premiered
moments.blurb: Season 3 of 'House Of The Dragon' premiered yesterday, June 22nd, and is now streaming on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max.

angles.name: Return to Westeros
angles.copy: Fire and Blood is back! House Of The Dragon Season 3 dropped yesterday. Who's already binged it?

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Still thinking about the House Of The Dragon Season 3 premiere. What were your first impressions?

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender S2 Arrives
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' is set to premiere on Netflix on Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: Bending Back
angles.copy: Get ready, Avatar fans! The Last Airbender Season 2 hits Netflix this Thursday. Are you excited for more bending action?

angles.name: What to Watch
angles.copy: Your next binge-watch is almost here! Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 lands on Netflix this week.

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 on Disney+
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated fifth season of 'The Bear' will be available to stream on Disney+ from Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Chef's Kiss TV
angles.copy: Yes, chef! Season 5 of 'The Bear' drops on Disney+ this Friday. Prepare for more kitchen chaos and culinary brilliance!

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Your weekend plans just got better: The Bear Season 5 is coming to Disney+ on Friday! Who's ready for another serving?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Bonehead!
moments.blurb: Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs, co-founder and rhythm guitarist of Oasis, turns 61 today.

angles.name: Oasis Legend
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Bonehead from Oasis! What's your favourite Oasis track he helped shape?

angles.name: Britpop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 61st Birthday to Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs! A true Britpop legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jason Mraz!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for hits like 'I'm Yours,' celebrates his 49th birthday today.

angles.name: Mraz Day
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday to the incredibly talented Jason Mraz! What's your favourite song from him?

angles.name: Good Vibes
angles.copy: Sending good vibes and Happy 49th Birthday wishes to Jason Mraz, whose music always brightens the day.

moments.title: Happy Birthday KT Tunstall!
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter KT Tunstall, known for 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree,' turns 51 today.

angles.name: Scottish Star
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the fantastic KT Tunstall! Which of her songs is your go-to?

angles.name: Cherry Tree Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st to the brilliant KT Tunstall! Still rocking 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree' regularly.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Leee John!
moments.blurb: Leee John, lead singer of the iconic 80s soul and funk band Imagination, celebrates his 69th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagination Legend
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the incredible Leee John from Imagination! Get 'Body Talk' on repeat today.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 69th to Leee John, the smooth voice of Imagination. Pure soul!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger!
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for her work with The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on June 29th.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Nicole Scherzinger's 48th birthday on June 29th! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy early 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! She's still 'Don't Cha' know, a total star.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ian Paice!
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only constant member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: On June 29th, we celebrate the 78th Birthday of Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice! What's your favourite Deep Purple riff?

angles.name: Classic Rocker
angles.copy: Happy early 78th Birthday to the one and only Ian Paice! Still an absolute titan behind the kit.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Colin Hay!
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the Scottish-Australian frontman of Men at Work and successful solo artist, turns 73 on June 29th.

angles.name: Men at Work Maestro
angles.copy: It's Colin Hay's 73rd Birthday on June 29th! Let's hear it for the voice behind 'Down Under' and so many more.

angles.name: Aussie Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 73rd to Colin Hay! Still bringing joy with his timeless tunes.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry!
moments.blurb: Deborah Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, will celebrate her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to wish the legendary Debbie Harry a very Happy 81st Birthday on July 1st! A true punk and pop icon.

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: Still looking and sounding incredible! Happy early 81st Birthday to the one and only Deborah Harry.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott!
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott will be turning 55 on July 1st.

angles.name: Work It
angles.copy: Get your freak on for Missy Elliott's 55th Birthday on July 1st! A true pioneer of hip-hop and R&B.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Wishing an early Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! Her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke!
moments.blurb: Synth-pop innovator Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Master
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to synth wizard Vince Clarke on July 3rd! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, he's shaped so much of the 80s sound.

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer
angles.copy: An early Happy Birthday to Vince Clarke! His electronic magic is still making us dance.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Shane Lynch!
moments.blurb: Shane Lynch, member of the hugely popular Irish boyband Boyzone, celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyzone Star
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Shane Lynch of Boyzone a very Happy 50th Birthday on July 3rd! What's your favourite Boyzone hit?

angles.name: Irish Pop
angles.copy: Happy early 50th Birthday to Shane Lynch! Still a pop heartthrob from the 90s.
